items.title: AI Is Moving up the Software Lifecycle: from Code Review to PRD Governance
items.original_summary: Technology companies are extending AI beyond code generation into earlier stages of the software lifecycle, including PRD validation, design inputs, and code review. Initiatives from Uber, DoorDash, and Cloudflare highlight a shift toward AI-driven governance layers that evaluate engineering artifacts before implementation while preserving human oversight across the development pipeline. By Leela Kumili
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 报道 Uber、DoorDash、Cloudflare 等公司将 AI 应用从 code generation 延伸到 PRD 校验、设计输入与代码审查等更早的 SDLC 阶段，形成 AI 驱动的治理层。属于行业实践综述，非厂商官方产品发布。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：评估团队在 PRD/设计评审环节是否需要引入 LLM-as-judge；可在内部 CI 中加一道 LLM-based diff 审查步骤，参考 Cloudflare 的策略保留 human-in-the-loop 兜底。

items.title: Microsoft Brings AI-Powered Vulnerability Remediation to Azure DevOps with Copilot Autofix
items.original_summary: Microsoft has announced the limited public preview of Copilot Autofix for GitHub Advanced Security for Azure DevOps, extending AI-powered vulnerability remediation to teams using Azure Repos. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Microsoft 在 GitHub Advanced Security for Azure DevOps 中推出 Copilot Autofix 公开预览版，将 AI 自动修复漏洞能力扩展到 Azure Repos 用户。新增能力是安全告警侧的一键 AI 修复，与代码生成 API 无直接关系，但会增加 Azure DevOps 服务端到端自动化负担。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：若团队使用 Azure Repos + GHAS，在组织设置中开启 Copilot Autofix preview，注意其会自动创建 PR，需要预先配置分支保护策略与 CODEOWNERS，避免绕过人工 review 直接合入 main 分支。

items.title: Vercel Introduces Eve, an Open-Source Framework for Building AI Agents
items.original_summary: Vercel has released Eve, an open-source framework for building, deploying, and operating AI agents in production. The framework uses a filesystem-based project structure to organize agent instructions, tools, skills, subagents, communication channels, and scheduled tasks, enabling developers to define agent behavior while reducing the amount of supporting infrastructure they need to implement. By Daniel Dominguez
items.chinese_summary: Vercel 开源发布 Eve 框架，用于构建、部署与运维生产级 AI agent。框架基于文件系统组织 agent 指令、tools、skills、subagents、通信通道与定时任务，定位是替代自研 agent 基础设施。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：可在内部新项目 PoC 中试用 Eve（npm/包名待官方确认），将现有 LangChain/AutoGen 风格的 tool registry 迁移到 Eve 的 filesystem-based 项目结构；对存量系统无需立即重写，先观察社区成熟度。

items.title: Dapr 1.18 Introduces Verifiable Execution, Bringing Cryptographic Trust to AI Agents and Workflows
items.original_summary: Diagrid has announced the release of Dapr 1.18, introducing what it calls Verifiable Execution, a new set of capabilities designed to bring cryptographic trust, provenance, and tamper-evident execution records to distributed applications and AI agents. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Dapr 1.18 发布 Verifiable Execution 能力，为分布式应用与 AI agent 工作流引入加密可验证的执行记录、防篡改与来源追溯。属于运行时层的可观测性/安全增强，未改变 LLM 调用接口本身。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：升级 Dapr 到 1.18，对承载 AI agent 的 workflow component 启用 verifiable execution，确保 agent tool 调用的每一次状态转换都有 cryptographic receipt，便于事后审计与合规追溯。

items.title: Microsoft Expands Azure Kubernetes Service with Bare Metal, Fleet Management and AI Infrastructure
items.original_summary: At this year's Microsoft Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled a broad set of enhancements to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) aimed at making Kubernetes a first-class platform for AI training, inference, and large-scale cloud-native applications. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Microsoft 在 Build 2026 上扩展 Azure Kubernetes Service，新增 Bare Metal、Fleet 管理与面向 AI 训练/推理的基础设施能力。属于托管 K8s 平台层增强，不直接改变上层 LLM/agent SDK 调用方式。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：若团队在 AKS 上跑自托管推理或 vLLM/SGLang，关注新增 Bare Metal SKU 与 Fleet manager 是否带来更优的 GPU 调度/价格档；az aks CLI 与 ARM API 需同步升级到最新版本。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，支持在 Apple Silicon 设备端运行 LLM 与生成式 AI，兼容 PyTorch 转换模型与预优化开源模型。这是端侧推理 SDK 重大升级，意味着旧 Core ML 工具链进入 deprecation 阶段。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：新 iOS/macOS 工程直接基于 Core AI 构建 on-device 模型加载与 inference（替换 Core ML）；存量 Core ML 工程需制定 Core ML → Core AI 迁移计划，关注 Core ML 官方 deprecation 时间线与 API 兼容垫片窗口。

items.title: Inside Target’s LLM-Based System for Semantic Matching in Marketing Forecast Pipelines
items.original_summary: Target built a generative AI system to improve marketing campaign forecasting by retrieving and ranking similar historical campaigns. Using embeddings, vector search, and LLM ranking, it replaces rule-based workflows. Evaluation shows 75% top-1 and 100% top-3 coverage. The system reduces manual effort, improves consistency, and uses feedback loops to refine retrieval using campaign outcomes. By Leela Kumili
items.chinese_summary: Target 公司公开其基于 LLM 的营销预测语义匹配系统：用 embedding + 向量检索 + LLM 排序替代规则化工作流，top-1 覆盖率达 75%、top-3 达 100%。属于业界案例分享，非供应商接口变更。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：若团队也在做相似营销/推荐场景的语义召回，可参考其 embedding + reranker 双阶段架构；无需任何 SDK 升级，关注自家向量库召回延迟与 rerank cost 的平衡即可。

items.title: AWS Previews FinOps Agent for Cost Analysis and Optimization
items.original_summary: Amazon has released AWS FinOps Agent in public preview, a managed service that automates several common FinOps workflows. The agent can investigate cost anomalies, correlate spend changes with AWS activity data, and integrate with tools such as Slack and Jira to route findings to resource owners. By Renato Losio
items.chinese_summary: AWS 发布 FinOps Agent 公开预览版，托管式自动化 FinOps 工作流，可调查成本异常、关联 AWS 活动数据，并集成 Slack/Jira 路由发现到资源负责人。属于云成本运维 agent，与 LLM API 调用方式无直接关联。
items.backend_focus: 行动项：在 AWS 组织中开启 FinOps Agent preview，配置 Slack/Jira 通知频道；账号内需要预先给 agent 相应 Cost Explorer 与 CloudTrail 只读权限，建议先用非生产组织做灰度验证。
